titleStmt.title: SII 4.262: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 262. (A.R. No. 33 of 1889). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE KRISHNASVAMIN TEMPLE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
This and the following lines begin with an anusvāra resembling a circle.svasti . śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhanaśakava(ru)¨rṣaṁgaḷu 1455 neya naṁdanasaṁvacharada mā¨rgaśira śuddha 12 sōmavāradalū śrīman®(ṁ)mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra Accyutadēvarāyamahārāyarū śrībālakṛṣṇadēvarige gōdvādaśipu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalū sama¨rpisidu kṛṣṇāpurada pēṭheya davasadaṁgaḍigaḷa toḍeyada bageyallū saluva ghaṭivarahaSpace for about three letters is left blank here.
prāku dēvara Amṛtapaḍige naḍadubahudu ga 800 ke śudhavaraha gaSpace for about three letters is left blank here.kaṁ varadāji dēviA(ṁ)mmanavarū sama¨rpista Avasara 1 kaṁ dina 1 kaṁ saluvadu cakraga 9 hoṁninalū varuṣa 1 kaṁ ga 3240 Accutadēvarāyamahārāyarū sama¨rpista ciṁnada Uyyāleya tirunāḷu 1 kaṁ cakraga 300 muṁnūṟu koḍetirunāḷu 1 kaṁ cakraga 300 muṁnūṟu Aṁttū ga3840 varadājiAṁmanavarū sama¨rpista Avasarada ni(ṁ)¨rmālyada prasādavanū paṁcānāthaparadēsiśrīvaiṣṇava
rige pasāpaḍali kāvadū . yī dha¨r(ṁ)maśāsanake maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 4.262 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
